project_name: Bloom & Vibe - The Anti-Boring Flower Shop

principles: No generic white e-commerce grids. Use color blocking.
Typography must feel like a magazine, not a spreadsheet.
Motion is mandatory. Flowers are alive; the UI should be too.
Gifting is the core use case. Prioritize 'Emotions' over 'Categories'.

colors.palette_strategy: Light Mode with Vibrant Color Blocking
usage_rules: Background: Use 'bg-background' (Warm White) as the canvas.
Text: Use 'text-foreground' (Deep Jungle Green) for readability. NEVER pure black.
Primary (Vibrant Pink): Use for CTA buttons, sale tags, and 'Love' category highlights.
Secondary (Marigold Yellow): Use for 'Joy' category and highlights.
Accent (Soft Purple): Use for 'Sympathy' or 'Calm' sections.
Gradients: Subtle mesh gradients allowed in hero backgrounds only. No linear hard gradients on buttons.

grid_systems.bento_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 md:gap-8
grid_systems.product_grid: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-x-8 gap-y-12

strategies: Bento Grid for Categories: Use Mode A (Tetris Grid). Mix squares, tall rectangles, and wide blocks.
Asymmetry: In product lists, offset every 2nd card slightly (translate-y-4) to create rhythm.
Whitespace: Use 'p-8' or 'p-12' inside cards. Don't crowd the flowers.

buttons.primary: rounded-full bg-primary text-white px-8 py-4 font-medium transition-all hover:scale-105 hover:shadow-lg active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: rounded-full bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground px-8 py-4 font-medium transition-all hover:bg-secondary/80
buttons.outline: rounded-full border-2 border-foreground/10 bg-transparent px-8 py-4 font-medium hover:bg-foreground/5

cards.product: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-white border border-border/50 transition-all hover:shadow-xl hover:border-primary/20
cards.category: relative overflow-hidden rounded-3xl p-8 transition-all hover:scale-[1.02]
cards.feature: bg-card rounded-xl p-8 border border-border shadow-sm

inputs.default: rounded-xl border-border bg-white/50 px-4 py-3 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 focus:border-primary transition-all

navigation.header: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-border/40 transition-all
navigation.link: text-sm font-medium hover:text-primary transition-colors relative after:content-[''] after:absolute after:bottom-[-4px] after:left-0 after:w-0 after:h-[2px] after:bg-primary after:transition-all hover:after:w-full

textures: Grain Overlay: Add a fixed 'opacity-[0.03] pointer-events-none mix-blend-multiply' noise texture to the entire body.
Organic Shapes: Use SVG blobs in the background for section dividers.

assets.image_style: High-quality, vibrant, natural light. No artificial studio lighting unless it's pop-art style.

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL FONTS FIRST: Run 'yarn add @fontsource/playfair-display @fontsource/manrope @fontsource/caveat' immediately.
TAILWIND CONFIG: Update 'tailwind.config.js' with the specific HSL color values provided in 'colors.tailwind_config'. Do NOT rely on defaults.
SHADCN OVERRIDES: The default shadcn components are too 'enterprise'. You MUST round the corners more (radius: 1rem) and increase padding.
NO DEFAULT CARDS: Do not use the standard Shadcn 'Card' component for the main product list. Build a custom 'ProductCard' component using the 'cards.product' classes defined above.
ANIMATION IS KEY: Use 'framer-motion' for page transitions. Wrap the 'Routes' in 'AnimatePresence' if possible, or at least animate section entrances.
TESTING: Every button and input must have a 'data-testid'. Example: 'add-to-cart-btn', 'email-input'.
HEADER: Make the header sticky and glassmorphic. It should feel like it's floating.
IMAGES: Use the provided image URLs. Do not use placeholders.
ICONS: Use 'lucide-react' for icons. Keep them thin and elegant.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all.
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
